---
name: frontend-design
description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
---

Use this skill to build polished frontend pages and components with a clear visual direction, responsive behavior, and maintainable structure.

## Core requirements
- Follow project design tokens and typography rules.
- Avoid generic layouts and default visual patterns.
- Include meaningful motion only where it improves perception.
- Ensure responsiveness for desktop and mobile.
- Prefer reusable component decomposition.
